ariaDownload.description: Accessibility label for the download button.

ariaFrameStep.description: Accessibility label for frame-by-frame playback button.

ariaPlaybackSpeed.description: Accessibility label for the speed button.

ariaRecord.description: Accessibility label for the recording button.

ariaScreenshot.description: Accessibility label for the screenshot button.

ariaToolbox.description: Accessibility label for the toolbox main button.

captionDownload.description: Caption below the download action button.

captionFrameStep.description: Caption below the frame-by-frame playback action button.

captionRecord.description: Caption below the recording action button.

captionRemix.description: Caption below the Remix action button.

captionScreenshot.description: Caption below the screenshot action button.

captionToolbox.description: Caption below the toolbox main button.

downloadFailed.description: Shown when the download API request fails.

downloadNotImplemented.description: Hint text shown when the download button is clicked.

downloadNoVideoSource.description: Shown when no video URL is available.

extDescription.message: A browser extension for YouTube Shorts (youtube.com/shorts/*): turns the Shorts right action rail into a toolbox with speed control, frame-by-frame playback, screenshot, recording, and download; options are available from the extension icon (arrow-key volume, panel expand direction), while keeping the UI and interaction rhythm close to native Shorts.

popupArrowVolumeLabel.description: Label for arrow-key volume toggle in popup.

popupPanelExpandRightLabel.description: Label for toolbox panel expansion direction toggle in popup.

popupAriaDefaultShortSpeedCycle.description: ARIA label for the default playback speed cycle button.

popupAriaHoldSpeedCycle.message: Cycle playback speed while holding on the player: 1×, 1.5×, 2×, 3×.
popupAriaHoldSpeedCycle.description: ARIA label for the hold-to-accelerate speed cycle button.

popupDefaultHoldSpeedLabel.message: Default speed while holding on the player
popupDefaultHoldSpeedLabel.description: Popup label for hold-to-accelerate default rate.

popupDefaultShortSpeedLabel.description: Popup label for normal playback default rate.

screenshotFailed.description: Shown when screenshot capture workflow fails.

screenshotNoVideoSource.message: No video source available for screenshot.
screenshotNoVideoSource.description: Shown when screenshot capture cannot get a valid video source.
